summary: Plan is structurally sound and well-sequenced. Two corrections needed: particleField has a different attribute set (no color), and the renderLoop init path has an existing initAllForValidation branch that step 6 must account for.

changes_required.issue: Plan states all systems share the same REQUIRED_ATTRIBUTES including color:3. particleField.ts does NOT set a color attribute — colors are computed GPU-side in the shader.
changes_required.fix: Each system must define its own REQUIRED_ATTRIBUTES. pointCloud and ribbonField include {name:'color',itemSize:3}; particleField omits it. The plan already mentions 'may differ slightly' but step 4 applies a single schema to all. Make this explicit.

changes_required.issue: particleField.ts description says 'Same expected attribute schema' — this is incorrect per the color attribute difference.
changes_required.fix: particleField REQUIRED_ATTRIBUTES should be [{name:'position',itemSize:3},{name:'size',itemSize:1},{name:'aHueOffset',itemSize:1},{name:'aRandom',itemSize:3}] (4 attributes, no color).

changes_required.issue: renderLoop.ts already has a branching init path: one branch uses initAllForValidation + validateShaderCompilation (US-048/US-049), the other calls d.geometrySystem.init() directly. The plan says 'wrap the geometry system init call in try/catch' but does not acknowledge both branches.
changes_required.fix: The try/catch and geometryValid flag must wrap both branches of the existing if/else at lines 165-177. Describe this explicitly so the implementer does not accidentally lose the initAllForValidation path.

optional_suggestions.suggestion: Consider also validating that all attribute arrays have the same count (i.e., position.count === size.count === aRandom.count). A mismatch would produce subtle rendering bugs that are hard to diagnose.
For the particleField integration test, explicitly assert that color attribute is NOT present (to confirm the system's shader-side color approach and that the validator schema matches).

files_validated.src/visual/systems/pointCloud.ts: exists — attributes: position(3), color(3), size(1), aHueOffset(1), aRandom(3)
files_validated.src/visual/systems/particleField.ts: exists — attributes: position(3), size(1), aHueOffset(1), aRandom(3) — NO color attribute
files_validated.src/visual/systems/ribbonField.ts: exists — attributes: position(3), color(3), size(1), aHueOffset(1), aRandom(3)
files_validated.src/visual/renderLoop.ts: exists — init has two branches (initAllForValidation vs plain init)
files_validated.src/visual/types.ts: exists — has GeometrySystem and FrameState interfaces, no AttributeSpec yet
files_validated.src/visual/geometryValidator.ts: does not exist — correct to create

risk_assessment: low — validation runs once at init, no per-frame cost. Main risk is the particleField schema mismatch if not corrected.
